final-comment-csa: Final Comments will be added to the CSA Report.
final-comment-apl: Final Comments will be added to the APL Report.
final-comment-pl: Final Comments will be added to the PL Report.
multiple-case-number: Separate multiple Case/Incident# with a comma or semicolon
sufficient-agreement: The statement that 'Potential Link' exists between two toolmarks means that the likelihood another tool (firearm) could have made the mark is so remote as to be considered a practical impossibility.
prior-entry: Use this button to duplicate information entered from the previous image scanned.
addtoexist-agency:
Images can only be added to the gallery which is belonged to this Agency.
    Images cannot be added to other gallery which are shared to this Agency.
addtoexist-user:
Images can only be added to the gallery which is belonged to this User.
    Images cannot be added to other gallery which are other Users of shared to this User.
findexist-agency: Just can find existing gallery belonged to this Agency, not include shared gallery.
findexist-user: Just can find existing gallery belonged to this User, not include agency gallery and shared gallery.
assign: Probe images may be manually associated with a gallery subject when the candidate did not appear in the result list. The subject can be found by name or object ID and assigned him/her as the only probe image result. It will have a score of 100 and highlighted in green.
verify:
An Examiner can verify a result candidate as: (l) meets ‘Potential Link’ or (ll) does not meet ‘Potential Link’ of the gallery image. An examiner can also un-verify an existing verified result candidate by clicking on verify and selecting the option: (lll) not verify.

   Potential Link which is verified by an examiner will be highlighted in a green color. If Potential Link is not met then it will be verified by the examiner and highlighted in a black color. A previous Potential Link that upon further review has been determined not to have Potential Link and is unverified will result in the original color of the result candidate.
activesync:
- Checkin "Active Synchronization Gallery/Upload": allow synchronization Gallery from FS Web to LineUp and Upload Probes, Potential Link, Alerts from LineUp to FS Web.
   - Uncheck "Active Synchronization Gallery/Upload": have no any synchronization Gallery and upload Data at the moment checked.
   - Default will be checked in Active Synchronization Gallery/Upload.
timesync: Default is 1, minimum is 1, maximum is 1,000,000.
limitglsize: The maximum number of agency-owned images in all agency created galleries. To increase your gallery size, please contact Evidence IQ.
limitglsize-fsl:
The maximum number of lineup-owned images in all agency created galleries. To increase your gallery size, please contact Evidence IQ. Default is 1000, minimum is 0.
  Unit = Number of Images:
  - Default Gallery limit = 1000 images
  - Gallery Size Limit = 0: have no any image
  - Unlimited Gallery Size: have no any limit for LineUp
num-good-possible: This setting controls the maximum number of results that will be labeled as Good or Potential Link from a given search.
num-good-possible-admin: This setting controls the maximum number of results that will be labeled as Good or Potential Link from a given search.
ftppath: When updated successful, this folder has been created on the WEBSERVER. The SFTP server will allow the batch upload of large gallery files in .zip format. After upload, browse the folder during 'Batch Gallery Import' to finish uploading the gallery.
addtowl: Selected gallery images will be added to the Watch List. It will remain in the Watch List until its expiration date. When any subject from the Watch List appears in a search result meeting or exceeding its Match Confidence score, an email will be sent to assigned email addresses. An alert will also generate on Ballistics IQ.
focus-button-viewgl: * Each individual function is available to a single record  when highlighted.
focus-button-viewwl: * Each individual function is available to a single record  when highlighted.
select-button-viewgl: * Functions 'Delete', 'Export Records', 'Map It', 'Compare Images' and 'CSA Report' can apply to multiple records when images are checked.
select-button-viewgl-user: * Functions 'Export Records', 'Map It', 'Compare Images' and 'CSA Report' can apply to multiple records when images are checked.
select-button-viewgl-admin: * Functions 'Export Records' can apply to multiple records when images are checked.
select-button-viewwl: * Functions 'Delete' and 'Export Records' can apply for selected records (not include for highlighted one).
select-button-viewwl-admin: * Functions 'Export Records' can apply for selected records (not include for highlighted one).
focus-button-viewprobe: These functions only apply to a single, highlighted record.
select-button-viewprobe: These functions apply to highlighted record or multiple records with a selected checkbox.
includena-help:
Image records may have data fields not available and assigned a value of "N/A".
   • When selected, any image with an "N/A" value in any data field will be included in the search results. By default, the N/A box is checked.
   • For example, if you are searching for a MALE subject, images with a Gender value of "N/A" will be included in your search results.
   • If the N/A box is NOT checked, all records with a Gender value of "N/A" will be excluded from the search.
   • It is advised to select the N/A box unless you want to limit your search results with fields only with valid data.
minscore:
This is the minimum match score required for an image to be shown in your result candidates list. Match scores below this threshold will be omitted.
    We recommend a Minimum Score of between 40 and 50. Higher minimum scores will narrow down results further, but might eliminate real matches.
resultcandidate: The number of candidates to be displayed in probe image search results, ranked by score. Recommended value is between 1 and 50.
resultcandidate-admin: The number of candidates to be displayed in probe image search results, ranked by score. Recommended value is between 1 and 50.
ftppath-admin: When selected, enter the FTP Path. This folder will be created on the WEBSERVER. The SFTP server will allow the customer to batch upload large gallery files in .zip format. After upload, the customer can browse the folder during "Batch Gallery Import" to finish uploading the gallery.
minfrqsearch: The minimum CRQ threshold of a probe image must meet before an automated search begins.
lineupserver: Search all probe images from FaceBox/cameras, which were automatically searched by LineUp Server.
manualsearch: Search all probe images which were manually searched by Ballistics IQ users.
explain-expiration: The 'Expiration Period' will allow Admins to enter 0-999 Days. With 0 being infinite days. The default will be 90 Days. After the expiration period has been met for the users, they will be prompted to update on next login.
explain-minimumlength: The 'Minimum Length' can be 8-99 characters long with the default of (8). If the Admin attempts to put 0 or non-number, a warning should be displayed. "'Minimum Password Length' is invalid. The 'Minimum Length' must be between 8-99
state-searchface: Default value is the state selected in login Agency/User's profile.
viewtopresult: Filter number of result candidates for viewing. Default value  is "All Candidates" it is "Number of result candidates" defined by Agency in Expert Settings. Select from dropdown list to view different number of result candidates.
density-map: (There are additional galleries available for viewing – please contact the Agency Manager at the specific Department to be granted permission to view their gallery.)
internal: If checked , this is Internal Agency. All internal agencies will not be displayed in the data sharing map.
transfer-batch-import: Ballistics IQ has received your file upload and is analyzing your images. You can check this upload's status (including notice of any failed records) from Search > Uploaded Files (Images).
limit-user: The number of User that Agency can create.
min-tracking-frq:
For a camera in Tracking mode, this setting establishes the minimum CRQ required for a probe image to be searched against your galleries.
    For systems with low traffic, a low Minimum Tracking CRQ is desirable because it allows more probe images to be searched. However, for higher traffic systems, this value should be raised to save resources for searching only higher-CRQ images, which have better chances of generating matches.
min-checkin-frq:
For a camera in CheckIn mode, this setting establishes the minimum CRQ required for a probe image to be searched against your galleries.
    This value is generally set higher than the Minimum Tracking CRQ because CheckIn subjects are assumed to be more cooperative, which results in higher CRQs.
ssn:
Allow Character:
    - Maximum 20 chars
    - Number from 0-9
    - Characters from a-z or A-Z
    - Special char: -
photo-array: Select the images that you wish to include in the photo array. The images will be shuffled so that the order of image presentation is randomized. The images will then be presented for viewing or printing. Only the image ID will be shown below each image in the resulting photo array. This ID will allow the associated meta data to be retrieved for any image.
password-require:
- Be a minimum length of eight (8) characters.
- Not a dictionary word or proper name.
- Not be the same as the Userid.
- Not be identical to the previous ten (10) passwords.
casenotes: Use this form to provide contact information related to this alert.
